metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Ivygate to break the spell.

moongate.name: Moongate 4
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.
moongate.interact_text: You step through the moongate. The world blurs and reforms around you.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.
whispering_stones.interact_text: The stones whisper: 'Seek the shadow beneath the mountain. The key lies where light cannot reach.'

towns.name: Ivygate
towns.description: A bustling market town where traders from distant lands hawk exotic wares.

key_dungeons.name: Howling Vaults
key_dungeons.description: A narrow crevice leads into Howling Vaults. The sound of dripping water echoes endlessly below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Howling Vaults and claim the Amber Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.
